seo.defaultDescription: Read EU laws like the GDPR, AI Act, DMA, DSA and Data Act with ease. Navigate articles, recitals, annexes and cross-references, side by side.
seo.defaultKeywords: EU law, GDPR, AI Act, DMA, DSA, Data Act, read EU law, EU regulation reader, legal tech
seo.landingDescription: Read EU laws like the GDPR, AI Act, DMA, DSA and Data Act with ease. Navigate articles, recitals, annexes and cross-references, side by side.

error.routingError: LegalViz hit a routing error while opening this page.
error.unexpectedProblem: LegalViz ran into an unexpected problem while loading this page.

search.placeholderLaws: Search primary EU acts by title, reference, or CELEX
search.placeholderMatches: Search across last opened law matches...
search.searchingLaws: Searching primary EU acts from the LegalViz index since 2010. Secondary acts are not included yet.
search.searchingMatches: Searching {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}. Open a law in this language to make it searchable.
search.searchingCached: Searching {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}. Open a law in this language to make it searchable.
search.typeLaws: Search primary EU acts by title, reference, or CELEX. Secondary acts are not included yet.
search.noCached: No last opened laws are searchable in {language} yet. Open a law in this language to add it to search.
search.typeCached: Type to search across {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}.
search.noResultsLaws: No primary EU acts found for "{query}".
search.noResultsCached: No results found for "{query}" in {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}.

topBar.byline: By Konrad Kollnig, Law & Tech Lab Maastricht

landing.heroDescription: Search primary EU acts by title, reference, or CELEX to open the law you need fast. LegalViz then shows chapters, articles, recitals, and annexes side by side.
landing.option2: Option 2 · Open a law from your library
landing.importHelper: Choose the act type, year, and number. If automatic import fails, LegalViz opens the corresponding EUR-Lex search page.
landing.example: Example for GDPR: choose Regulation, enter 2016 as the year, and 679 as the number.
landing.invalidReference: Enter a 4-digit year and a numeric law number.
landing.automaticImportFallback: Automatic lookup failed, so EUR-Lex search was opened in a new tab.
landing.importUnavailable: Could not open this law right now.
landing.visualiseStepsTitle: Visualise other EU laws in 4 simple steps
landing.extensionDescription: Want to visualise a different EU law? Install our browser extension to open any recent EU law from EUR-Lex in this visualiser.
landing.step1: Install the extension for your browser (see links above).
landing.step2: Visit a EU law page on EUR-Lex.
landing.step3: Open the law in the English language using the language selector on EUR-Lex.
landing.step4: Click the extension icon to open that law in LegalViz directly.
landing.sourceCode: Source code and support on GitHub
landing.builtBy: Built by Konrad Kollnig at the Law & Tech Lab, Maastricht University.
landing.addLawCta: Add another law to your library
landing.addLawDescription: Open a law by official reference or bring it in directly from EUR-Lex.
landing.searchHint: Search primary EU acts by title, reference, or CELEX, then open them directly.
landing.searchPlaceholder: Search primary EU acts by title, reference, or CELEX
landing.libraryDescription: Open a law you have already added and continue reading where you left off.
landing.libraryEmpty: No laws are in your library yet. Add one to get started.
landing.recentDescription: Jump back into the laws you opened recently.
landing.recentEmpty: No recently opened laws yet. Search for one to get started.
landing.addLawDialogTitle: Add a law to your library
landing.addLawDialogDescription: Choose how you want to add the law. You can enter its official reference or use a EUR-Lex page directly.
landing.openFromEurlex: Add laws directly from EUR-Lex to your library
landing.pasteEurlexUrlHelper: Paste the URL of a EUR-Lex law page.
landing.importResolveFailed: This EUR-Lex page could not be resolved to a law LegalViz can open.
landing.extensionInline: Or install our extension to open any law directly from EUR-Lex by clicking the extension icon, without copying URLs:

resetFooter.title: Something isn't working?
resetFooter.button: Click here to reset the whole app
resetFooter.note: This clears LegalViz local settings and cached data in this browser.

printModal.title: Print Options
printModal.description: Customize what you want to include in your print-ready view or PDF.
printModal.includeRelatedRecitalsHelp: Automatically inserts relevant recitals next to articles based on AI analysis. Useful for understanding context.

relatedRecitals.title: Related Recitals
relatedRecitals.description: These recitals appear to be related to this article based on text analysis using simple AI (TF-IDF similarity (Nanda et al.)). Sorted by relevance score.

lawViewer.notAvailableTitle: This law is not available here yet
lawViewer.notAvailableMessage: We couldn't find the structured text version we use to display this law in LegalViz. The law itself may still be available on EUR-Lex.
lawViewer.lawLoadServiceFailed: The law could not be loaded from the Formex service.
lawViewer.referenceResolveFailed: This law reference could not be resolved automatically.
lawViewer.importResolveFailed: This EUR-Lex page could not be resolved to an importable CELEX document.
lawViewer.legacyExtensionMessage: LegalViz now imports laws through a new Formex-based flow. This older extension entrypoint is no longer supported, so please update your browser extension and try again.
lawViewer.selectPrompt: Select an article, recital, or annex from the menu to begin reading.
lawViewer.structuredVersionUnavailable: The structured LegalViz version of this law is not available right now.
lawViewer.lawContentUnavailable: The law content is unavailable right now.
lawViewer.quickNavigationHelp: Jump directly to a specific article, recital, or annex number.
lawViewer.articleNavigationHint: You can also use the left and right arrow keys to move between articles while reading.
lawViewer.legacyHtmlFallbackMessage: This law is being shown from an older EUR-Lex HTML format rather than structured Formex data. The layout may be rough, and LegalViz has switched the document language back to English for reliability.
lawViewer.sideBySideDesktopOnly: Side-by-side reading is available on larger screens. This device keeps showing the main language only.

metadata.title: Status & Dates
